name: San Juan
tagline: Caribbean Living with US Citizenship Benefits
description: San Juan offers the rare combination of tropical Caribbean living under the American flag. No passport needed, no currency exchange, and access to US banking and healthcare systems, all wrapped in 500 years of Spanish colonial history. Act 60 tax incentives make it especially attractive for investors, though the cost of living is moderate by Caribbean standards. Old San Juan's colorful streets and the island's stunning beaches make it a genuinely special place to call home.

quickFacts.safetyRating: Moderate – tourist areas are safe; exercise caution elsewhere
quickFacts.climate: Tropical maritime with warm temperatures year-round

housing.description: 1BR apartment in Santurce or Condado area; small but walkable to the beach

dining.description: Local fondas and food kiosks in Piñones 2-3x/week; mostly cooking at home

healthcare.description: ACA marketplace plan; costs similar to mainland US

transportation.description: Older car with insurance; some public transit and Uber available

entertainment.description: Beach days, Old San Juan walks, salsa clubs, free festivals

1M.lifestyle: This is a tight budget for San Juan, where groceries and utilities cost more than the mainland US. You can manage with a modest apartment and careful spending, but there is little room for extras. The beach is free, though, and the cultural richness of Old San Juan costs nothing to enjoy.

housing.description: Nice 2BR condo in Condado or Isla Verde with ocean views or pool access

dining.description: Regular dining in Condado and Old San Juan restaurants; weekend brunch culture

healthcare.description: ACA Gold plan with good coverage at Ashford Presbyterian and other hospitals

transportation.description: Reliable car with full coverage; island road trips on weekends

entertainment.description: Surfing in Rincón, day trips to El Yunque, dining and nightlife, gym membership

2M.lifestyle: San Juan becomes genuinely enjoyable at this budget. A comfortable condo near the beach, regular restaurant meals featuring the island's fantastic cuisine, and the freedom to explore Puerto Rico's rain forests, bioluminescent bays, and surfing beaches on weekends.

housing.description: Luxury 3BR condo in Condado high-rise or renovated townhouse in Old San Juan

dining.description: Fine dining at Marmalade, 1919, and Cocina Abierta; regular entertaining

healthcare.description: Premium health plan or private insurance with comprehensive coverage

transportation.description: Late-model SUV, premium insurance, occasional inter-island flights

entertainment.description: Deep-sea fishing, yacht club membership, premium gym, cultural events and festivals

3M.lifestyle: At this level you experience the best San Juan has to offer. A stunning home in one of the most beautiful neighborhoods in the Caribbean, world-class dining, and easy access to the island's natural wonders. The US legal framework adds security and convenience that few Caribbean destinations can match.

housing.description: Oceanfront penthouse in Condado or historic mansion in Old San Juan

dining.description: Private chef for daily meals plus regular fine dining at the island's top restaurants

healthcare.description: Concierge medicine with mainland US specialist access; comprehensive private insurance

transportation.description: Luxury vehicle, premium insurance, inter-island private flights

entertainment.description: Private yacht charters, deep-sea fishing, golf club membership, Caribbean island hopping

domesticHelp.description: Full-time housekeeper, part-time cook, gardener, and pool maintenance

luxuryExtras.description: Caribbean yacht trips, first-class mainland travel, Act 60 tax optimization, philanthropy

5M.lifestyle: You are living Caribbean luxury with American convenience. A breathtaking oceanfront home, full domestic staff, a private chef, and the ease of US banking and legal systems. Act 60 tax incentives can make this tier even more financially rewarding for qualifying investors.

housing.description: Beachfront estate in Dorado Beach or historic compound in Old San Juan

dining.description: Personal chef team, exclusive catered events, private wine cellar management

healthcare.description: Elite concierge medical, private physician on retainer, executive wellness program

transportation.description: Multiple luxury vehicles, private boat, chartered flights between islands and mainland

entertainment.description: Private yacht, deep-sea sport fishing, golf at Dorado Beach, global luxury travel

domesticHelp.description: Full estate staff: chef, butler, housekeepers, groundskeepers, security, boat captain, personal assistant

luxuryExtras.description: Yacht ownership, first-class global travel, art collecting, real estate investment, philanthropic foundation

10M.lifestyle: At this tier San Juan rivals any luxury destination in the world, with the massive added benefit of US territory tax advantages. A beachfront estate, a yacht, full staff, and the resources to live an extraordinary Caribbean life while maintaining all the protections of American citizenship.
